steps.title: Solve the linear equation
steps.content:
Use the second equation to find the value of $x$ before substituting into the quadratic equation:
$$x+8=11$$
$$x=3$$

steps.title: Substitute into the parabola
steps.content:
Now substitute $x=3$ into the first equation to find the requested $y$-value:
$$y=3^2+14(3)+48$$
$$y=9+42+48=99$$
The answer is 99.
